properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I don't know about tomorrow I just live from day to day I don't know from it's sunshine For its skies may turn to gray I don't worry o'er the future For I know what Jesus said And today I'll walk beside Him For He knows what is ahead

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Many things about tomorrow, I don't seem to understand; But I know Who holds tomorrow And I know Who holds my hand

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Every step is getting brighter As the golden stairs I climb Every burden's getting higher Every cloud is silver lined There, the sun is always shining There, no tear will dim the eye At the ending of the rainbow Where the mountains touch the sky

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I don't know about tomorrow It may bring me poverty But the One who feeds the sparrow Is the One who stands by me And the path that be my portion May be through the flame or flood But His presence goes before me And I'm covered with His blood
